name: Mapo
steps: Infuse Sichuan pepper corns into the oil disgarding the peppercorns after.
Caremelise the onions in the brat pan with the oil.
When brown add garlic and ginger until cooked.
Add the rest of the ingredients and bring to boil.
Cook the Mapo down slowly until the right consistency.
Blend in the thermo at speed 5 for 4 seconds each batch.

other_details.notes: Some dark soy may need to be added for the right colour
